function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "import requests
import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO

# Try to find working endpoint via the main site
r = requests.get('https://www.lipidmaps.org', timeout=10)
print(f"Main site: {r.status_code}")

# Look for batch query page
r2 = requests.get('https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query/', timeout=10)
print(f"Batch query: {r2.status_code}")

# Try common API patterns
# The batch query might be at a specific endpoint
try_pages = [
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query/batch_query_mz',
    'https://www.lipidmaps.org/batch_query/batch_query_lipid',
]
for p in try_pages:
    try:
        r = requests.get(p, timeout=5)
        print(f"GET {p}: {r.status_code}")
    except:
        pass
", "test_snippet": "pass", "timeout_seconds": 30}
